projects.raw_text:
IMC Bit Serial Computation on an 8T SRAM cell (Capstone)

Jun 2022 – Dec 2022


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Designed a 3*3 multiplication on an 8T SRAM Memory array using 65nm technology. Verified the functionality using Eldo.

Other contributors



+5
View all contributors
A complete RTL to GDS implementation of a design

Jan 2022 – May 2022


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Guide: Dr. Sneh Saurabh
Description: A synchronous design comprising of a counter, and an encoder is carried 
forward through the following steps:
RTL design, Coverage analysis, Synthesis, Equivalence check, Static timing analysis, DFT 
insertion, Chip planning, Placement, CTS, and Routing. Carrying the above steps, the 
provided specification is translated to a design realizable on the chip.

Skills: Verilog, Engineering, +1 skill

Design of I/O circuits for a 2RW 8T SRAM array

Jan 2022 – May 2022


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Guide: Dr. Anuj Grover
Description: Designed Multiplexer (MUX16), Write Driver, and Precharge circuit for an 
8192x32m16 Memory Array. MUX was designed with transmission gate logic to select the 
required columns. Write driver was integrated into the design. The Precharge circuit was 
placed above the MUX. Schematic, layout, and simulations were performed using Cadence.

Skills: Cadence Virtuoso, Cadence Virtuoso Layout Editor, +3 skills

Design of an IP for the DNNLS, MMSE, and LS Algorithms on  Vivado HLS and benchmark with the reference on SDK

Jan 2022 – May 2022


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Show project
Guide: Dr. Sumit Darak.
Description: Generated a custom IP to estimate the channel weight for a given SNR. 
Algorithms implemented for channel estimation are DNNLS, MMSE, and LS.

Skills: C (Programming Language), Xilinx Vivado, +1 skill

RTL Design of the 5 Stage RISC V Pipeline

Oct 2021 – Dec 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Show project
Guide: Dr. Sujay Deb
Description: Implemented the RISC V ISA in Vivado by using two-phase clocking to reduce 
the hardware requirement at an abstract level. The design also incorporates the bypassing 
logic to improve CPI.
The design is implemented using Verilog HDL.

Skills: Verilog, Engineering

OAI 222 implementation with pre and post layout analysis on complex and non complex implementation

Sep 2021 – Nov 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Guide: Dr. Anuj Grover
Description: Designed Domino CMOS OAI222 complex and non-complex gates and its 
layout using 65nm technology using cadence. Verified the functionality and PPA across 
various corners using Eldo. Compared the design with pre-and post-layout simulations.

Skills: Cadence Virtuoso, Cadence Virtuoso Layout Editor, +3 skills
